faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about creating your Bible video

items.question: What makes these videos special?
items.answer: Each video is custom-created from your story. It is a one-of-a-kind gift rooted in Scripture, prayer, and genuine care - designed to bring comfort and peace to your heart.

items.question: How long does it take to receive the video?
items.answer: Your finished Bible video is delivered in just 2-5 minutes. We use advanced AI technology to create your personalized video quickly while maintaining the highest quality.

items.question: What themes can I create videos about?
items.answer: Anything that honors God: birthdays, anniversaries, weddings, grief, encouragement, testimonies, or prayers for strength and healing. Share your heart, and we'll create a video that speaks to it.

items.question: How will I receive the finished video?
items.answer: You will receive a secure link via email to play your Bible video on any device and to easily share it with family and friends.

items.question: Can I use the video at church or events?
items.answer: Yes, you may share and play your Bible video at private events and church gatherings to inspire and comfort others.

items.question: What if generation fails?
items.answer: If your video fails to generate due to a technical issue, you will not lose any credits. We automatically refund your credits, and you can try again immediately.

cta.title: Fear not, for I am with you

quote.text: Fear not, for I am with you; be not dismayed, for I am your God.
